tools.name: deploy_agentic_rag
tools.description: Deploy Agentic RAG — configure autonomous retrieval agent with multi-source routing (AI Search, Bing, SQL, APIs), iterative search, self-evaluation, semantic caching. Use when: deploy, provision.

tools.name: evaluate_agentic_rag
tools.description: Evaluate Agentic RAG — measure retrieval quality, source selection accuracy, iteration efficiency, groundedness, citation accuracy, cost per query. Use when: evaluate, benchmark.

tools.name: tune_agentic_rag
tools.description: Tune Agentic RAG — optimize source routing weights, iteration thresholds, self-evaluation sensitivity, semantic cache, cost per query. Use when: tune, optimize retrieval.
